rules.rule: Controllers must be thin — delegate all logic to a single injected service.
Controllers must map each service exception type to the correct HTTP status code.
POST endpoints must return 201 Created with the created resource.
PUT endpoints must return 200 OK with the updated resource.
DELETE endpoints must return 200 OK with the deleted resource.
Controllers must be decorated with [ApiController] and [Route("api/[controller]")].
Controllers must inherit from RESTFulController or ControllerBase.
